recommendations.title: Little Nikita
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent works to uncover an all-American family as Soviet sleeper agents, and gets caught up in friendship with their oblivious teenage son.

recommendations.title: Made in America
recommendations.overview: A young black woman discovers that her father was a sperm donor, and if that wasn't bad enough, he's white.

recommendations.title: All About Them
recommendations.overview: Charlotte is cheating on Micha with Mélodie. Not suspecting a thing, yet feeling neglected, Micha in turn cheats on Charlotte.  But also with Mélodie. For Mélodie, things are topsy-turvy. She lies to both of them. She is privy to each of their lies.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.
